stemHtml: What is the purpose of the CPDLC LOG-ON procedure?

options.a: To exchange application information between an aircraft and a specific ATS unit.
options.b: To ensure the aircraft ID matches the flight plan exactly.
options.c: To allow an ATS unit to set up an ADS-C contract under certain conditions.
options.d: To exchange information between an aircraft and the Tower, providing position data.
